content: The FNTC, under its constitution, is required to work with concerned citizens, UN agencies, Human Rights organizations, NGOs and the government of the day to protect, maintain and advance the rights of other individuals and groups in Fiji
summary: The FNTC, under its constitution, is required to work with concerned citizens, UN agencies, Human Rights organizations, NGOs and the government of the day to protect, maintain and advance the rights of other individuals and groups in Fiji
